metadata.scene_summary: In the archive stack, a page keeps murmuring your name from inside a sealed ledger.
metadata.sanity_question: Do you study the whisper, take only what you can contain, or shut the ledger and move on?

options.label: Copy one fragment into your notebook

add_events: You kept only a fragment of the whisper, but it is yours now.

options.label: Read the page aloud and see what answers

add_events: The archive answered in your own voice, one heartbeat late.

options.label: Seal the ledger and back away

add_events: You sealed the ledger before it could finish the sentence.
